canonical_definition: A large-scale graph dataset from the Open Graph Benchmark representing an Amazon product co-purchasing network, used for node classification.
papers: Harnessing Explanations: LLM-to-LM Interpreter for Enhanced Text-Attributed Graph Representation Learning
Label-free Node Classification on Graphs with Large Language Models (LLMs)

definitions.text: A large-scale graph dataset from the Open Graph Benchmark representing an Amazon product co-purchasing network, used for node classification.
definitions.paper: Harnessing Explanations: LLM-to-LM Interpreter for Enhanced Text-Attributed Graph Representation Learning

definitions.text: Large-scale dataset from the Open Graph Benchmark containing product nodes with textual descriptions, used to evaluate scalability and cost-efficiency of label-free node classification methods.
definitions.paper: Label-free Node Classification on Graphs with Large Language Models (LLMs)
